zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan於1412年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾音巴內斯時，他的父親Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan46歲，母親Moira Macdonald of Moidart37歲。他於1445年之前與Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1441年登記服兵役。他去世於1496年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾托爾卡斯特爾享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan于1412年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾音巴內斯时，他的父亲Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan46岁，母亲Moira Macdonald of Moidart37岁。他于1445年之前与Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay在苏格兰音巴內-爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1441年登记服兵役。他去世于1496年在苏格兰音巴內-爾托爾卡斯特爾享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan was born in 1412, in Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan, was 46 and his mother, Moira Macdonald of Moidart, was 37. He married Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay before 1445, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1441. He died in 1496, in Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan est né en 1412, à Inverness, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Moira Macdonald of Moidart, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay avant 1445, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1441. Il est décédé en 1496, à Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan 1412 in Inverness, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan 46 und seine Mutter Moira Macdonald of Moidart 37. Er hat vor 1445 in Inverness-shire, Scotland Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1441 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1496 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan è nato il nel 1412 nel Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Moira Macdonald of Moidart, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay prima del 1445, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1441. Morì nel 1496, nel Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattanが1412年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアインバーネスで生まれた時，父Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattanは46歳，母Moira Macdonald of Moidartは37歳であった。1445年以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでFlorence - Flora MacDonald of Islayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1441年に兵役登録をした。彼は1496年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアトルカストルで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan(이)가 1412년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 인버네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Moira Macdonald of Moidart(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1445년 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1496년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 토르카스틀에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan nasceu em 1412, em Inverness, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Moira Macdonald of Moidart, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay antes 1445, em Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1441. Ele faleceu em 1496, em Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan родился в 1412 г. в местности инвирнесс, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Moira Macdonald of Moidart, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay перед 1445 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1441 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1496 г. в местности торкастл, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan nació en 1412, en Inverness, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Moira Macdonald of Moidart, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay antes de 1445, en Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1441. Murió en 1496, en Torcastle, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años.
